TENTATIVE RULING: Appearance required.

Remote appearances may be made. Please review Local Rule 14.1.
The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom:
WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED.
Meeting ID: 160 225 4765
Password: 514879
To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above.
EXAMINER: SEAN BANG

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Dec-23-2025 Continued To Feb-24-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for status hearing for filing of petition for final distribution or for approval of report on status of administration.

Dept. 204; Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Bailiff: Deputy Musto; Not reported

Petitioner Brenda B. Nelson represented by John E. Fasesky, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.

Petitioner has been ill and was unable to obtain documents timely.
Petitioner's request for 60-day continuance to complete accounting and file final distribution is GRANTED. Court orders matter continued to Feb-24-2026 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Aug-26-2025 Continued To Sep-23-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-21-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated November 22, 2023 and the codicil dated December 30, 2023, are admitted to probate. Brenda B. Nelson is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for August 26, 2025, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Magdaleno. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-24-2024 Continued To Aug-21-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John Fasesky appeared by zoom for Brenda Nelson (special administrator).

Mr. Fasesky stated that the heir search company is conducting a search for the paternal heirs so that they can give notice, and requested a continuance of the special administration as well as the hearing on the general petition. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to August 21, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Fasesky will present an order to Mr. Bang (probate examiner) extending special administration of the estate.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.
